component.name: Vespera
component.summary: Music player companion with synced lyrics, visualizer and equalizer

description.p: Vespera is a standalone, distro-agnostic music player companion. It is a controller, not a player: it drives whatever is already playing over MPRIS and wraps it in a premium, themeable interface.

ul.li: MPRIS control with ranked active-player selection and browser de-prioritisation
Synced lyrics (lrclib) with click-to-seek and per-track offset
Album-derived theming and an animated starry backdrop
Single-instance D-Bus control so any WM can bind keys to it

screenshot.caption: The expanded player with synced lyrics, visualizer and equalizer

description.p: Initial release: core MPRIS player, responsive layout, synced lyrics, cava visualizer and EasyEffects equalizer.
